steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: In the result clause, the subject is "her book's musings on tenth-century Japanese courtly life." The head noun is the plural noun "musings," not the singular noun "book."

steps.title: Match the verb number
steps.content: Choice A uses a singular perfect verb. Choice B uses a singular present-tense verb. Choice D also uses a singular verb form. The remaining verb agrees with the plural subject. The answer is C.
